CustomField.description: Short code identifying the truck category (e.g., VL for light vehicle, PL35 for 3.5-ton truck, PL12 for 12-ton truck, SPL for special heavy transport). This code is referenced by Transport_Rate__mdt.Truck_Code__c and stored on Trip__c.Truck_Type__c for audit.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Truck category code (e.g., VL, PL35, PL12, SPL). Must match the Truck Code used in Transport Rate records.
CustomField.label: Truck Code
